arguments.command: find ~/.m2/repository/com/github/docker-java -path '*/docker-java-api/*.jar' | head -3 && jar tf ~/.m2/repository/com/github/docker-java/docker-java-api/3.4.1/docker-java-api-3.4.1.jar | grep -i 'PullImageResultCallback' 2>/dev/null || echo "jar not found"; find ~/.m2/repository/com/github/docker-java -name 'docker-java-api*.jar' -not -name '*-sources*' 2>/dev/null | head -1
